rationale: The candidate provides a high-quality translation that balances technical terminology with natural Hindi phrasing. It correctly translates the subtitle (which was missing in the current version) and maintains all MDX structures and links. It uses 'गार्डरेल' (Guardrails) and 'प्रोसेसर' (Processor) which are standard in technical Hindi contexts, while keeping the prose engaging and direct, matching the original author's style.
